name: project-veritas
description: Real-time fact-checking platform built as a microservices monorepo.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @project-veritas/contracts && npm run build -w @project-veritas/config && npm run build -w @project-veritas/observability && npm run build -w @project-veritas/ingestion && npm run build -w @project-veritas/transcription && npm run build -w @project-veritas/reasoning && npm run build -w @project-veritas/notification && npm run build -w @project-veritas/history && npm run build -w @project-veritas/mobile
scripts.test: npm run test -w @project-veritas/contracts && npm run test -w @project-veritas/config && npm run test -w @project-veritas/observability && npm run test -w @project-veritas/ingestion && npm run test -w @project-veritas/transcription && npm run test -w @project-veritas/reasoning && npm run test -w @project-veritas/notification && npm run test -w @project-veritas/history && npm run test -w @project-veritas/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/config && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/observability && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/ingestion && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/transcription && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/reasoning && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/notification && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/history && npm run typecheck -w @project-veritas/mobile
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test
